name: Duplicati
description: Store securely encrypted backups in the cloud
compose:
name: slashnode-duplicati
services:
  duplicati:
    image: duplicati/duplicati:2.3.0.3
    container_name: duplicati
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      DUPLICATI__WEBSERVICE_PORT: '8200'
      DUPLICATI__WEBSERVICE_INTERFACE: any
      DUPLICATI__WEBSERVICE_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      DUPLICATI__WEBSERVICE_ALLOWED_HOSTNAMES: '*'
    volumes:
      - duplicati_data:/data
      - duplicati_shared-data-storage:/umbrel
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:38476:8200
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  duplicati_data:
    name: slashnode-duplicati_duplicati_data
  duplicati_shared-data-storage:
    name: slashnode-duplicati_duplicati_shared-data-storage
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (duplicati). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://duplicati.com/.
